description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The display shows a digital clock, date, and two icons at the bottom, with a subtle notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is finished in a metallic bronze color and prominently displays a triple-lens camera module in the top left corner, along with a centered, glossy Apple logo. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible buttons for volume and power, as well as a small switch likely for muting. The phone's design is minimalist and premium, with a smooth, glossy finish and precise detailing around the camera and buttons. The overall build suggests a combination of glass and metal, typical of high-end smartphones.
description: A premium, bronze-colored smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, triple rear cameras, and a sleek metallic frame. Features include a front display with a notch and a prominent Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen, digital clock, date, and icons, with a notch at the top.
description_view_1: Angled front-side view highlighting the slim metallic edge and the side button layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bronze metallic back, triple camera module in the top left, and centered Apple logo.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the camera bump, side buttons, and the phone's flat edges.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the phone, contrasting with the bronze metallic finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock reading 14:05, the date 'Tuesday, August 24', a lock icon at the top, and two circular icons at the bottom, all over a pastel geometric wallpaper.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a triangular pattern within a raised square module, accompanied by a flash.
attribute_button_layout: There are three physical buttons on the left edge (two volume buttons and a mute switch) and one larger button on the right edge (power button), all rectangular and flush with the metallic frame.
